name: cypress-to-playwright-migration
description: Cypress → Playwright migration monorepo — Conduit (RealWorld) as app under test

scripts.app:up: npm run app:setup && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d --build && bash infra/scripts/wait-for-app.sh
scripts.app:urls: echo 'Frontend (UI):  http://localhost:3000' && echo 'Backend (API):  http://localhost:3001/api' && echo 'Postgres:       localhost:5432 (user/db: conduit)'
